summary.headline: Bunge extends expiration date of exchange offers for Viterra notes.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. extended the expiration date of its exchange offers and consent solicitations related to Viterra's debt securities from April 7, 2025, to May 5, 2025.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. extended the expiration date of its exchange offers and consent solicitations related to Viterra's debt securities.
